message:
perf(extensions): eliminate redundant safe_canonicalize() calls on every path check

Complete the canonicalization caching work begun in 4811ddad by ensuring all
stored extension roots are pre-canonicalized at insertion time rather than
re-canonicalized on every access check:

- add_allowed_read_root() now canonicalizes once at storage time
- detect_monorepo_escape() expects pre-canonicalized roots parameter
- Six allowed_read_roots check sites simplified to direct starts_with()
- PiJsResolver switched to canonical_extension_roots
- Test call sites updated to construct and pass canonical_roots vectors

This eliminates potentially expensive filesystem syscalls (safe_canonicalize
calls stat(2) internally) from hot paths in module resolution and file
access permission checks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
